summary.text: Customers find these headphones to be good quality earbuds with great sound quality. They appreciate the comfort and microphone quality. However, durability presents concerns as some units break in days and do not last at all. Customers have mixed experiences with reliability, fit, and connectivity.

authors_reviews.title: Best... BEST Budget wired USBC earbuds .
authors_reviews.text: Apple EarPods (USB-C)Okay honestly for $24 these are the best sounding cost effective wired earbuds money can buy. Money can buyIt's nothing fancy, no noise canceling, just an ear bud that fits into most people's ears comfortably, has a little volume up and down controlled at works even on an Android phone, and actually sounds fantastic for the price. It's still a great value and easily can recommend this as a backup to Bluetooth. There are lots of USBC wired earbuds out there for about the same amount of money... But these ones are hands down actually. Very good.Sound quality wise. The bass to treble is well balanced and seals right into your ears quite nicely. Honestly, I really can't complainGreat value cost effective. Pretty good sound for the price. You really can't go wrong. If you're looking for a wired USBC backup for your Apple or even Android phone, you literally can't go wrong with these and I don't recommend looking for third-party cheaper no name brands because I've tried a dozen of those other brands and nothing compared to the sound quality that these offer. Hands downUpdate:Apple Earpods (3.5mm Headphone Plug)Got the 3.5mm plug version.. same fit as USBC one. Since it's an analog plug is specifically got it to plug right into xbox controller for online game chat. It's less weight on the head than any other headphon+boom mic gamer headphones. Actually sounds just great and mic works great with Xbox. I dislike having such a heavy sweaty headphone while playing games. These are awesome. They're deceptively great sounding compared to other wires earbuds. Fit nicely and don't hurt long term. I recommend these easily for gamers who like to chat whilst gaming.
authors_reviews.author: LuckyLucy

authors_reviews.title: Durable, good sound quality
authors_reviews.text: Best earbud ever. I bought these couple months ago for school. I accidentally put these in my laundry three times and it js keep working. Super durable, lossless audio js perfect
authors_reviews.author: Liu Thang

authors_reviews.title: First Impressions – Clean Sound & Classic Apple Quality
authors_reviews.text: I just received these Apple wired headphones and wanted to share my first impressions. Right out of the box, the quality feels premium and well-made, exactly what I expect from Apple products.The sound is clean, balanced, and clear. Vocals are crisp, and the overall audio experience is very enjoyable for music, podcasts, and calls. I also appreciate the comfortable fit — they sit securely without feeling uncomfortable.Another thing I love is the simplicity: just plug and play. No connection issues — very convenient for everyday use.So far, I’m really happy with this purchase and excited to continue using them. I’ll definitely update my review after more use, but my first impression is very positive!Highly recommended ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
authors_reviews.author: Uliana Shubenok

authors_reviews.title: Good product
authors_reviews.text: work good. Prefer wired to wireless.
authors_reviews.author: Derek Capri

authors_reviews.title: Solid, Classic EarPods with a Modern USB-C Twist
authors_reviews.text: I recently picked up the Apple EarPods (USB-C) to use with my iPhone 15, and they’ve been a pleasant surprise. Even though wireless earbuds dominate the market, there’s something refreshing about the simplicity and reliability of wired EarPods — and this new USB-C version keeps that familiar Apple quality intact.The sound quality is clean and balanced, with crisp vocals and decent bass for the price. They’re perfect for calls, podcasts, and everyday music listening. The built-in microphone picks up my voice clearly, and I’ve had no complaints on calls. I also appreciate that there’s no lag or connection issue — just plug them in and go, no charging or pairing hassles.Comfort-wise, they fit well in my ears for shorter sessions, though after a couple of hours they can feel a bit firm compared to silicone-tipped earbuds. Still, the lightweight design makes them great for quick use or travel.My only small complaint is that Apple didn’t include a carrying case, and the cable still feels a bit fragile — I wish it were a bit more reinforced.Overall, these are reliable, no-fuss wired earbuds with excellent compatibility and classic Apple sound. Perfect for those who prefer plug-and-play convenience over Bluetooth.
authors_reviews.author: Mikesh Patel

authors_reviews.title: Great headphones with good sound quality
authors_reviews.text: These headphones are fantastic. They are compact and have great quality sound through the microphone. Compatible with lightening (apple iphone) which is fantastic. I upgraded my phone and needed some earphones I could use without an adapter. These have great sound quality. I also love the volume adjuster on the cord. Only thing I didn't like is that they didn't come with a storage case. The packaging was cardboard, so I'll have to get something to keep them neat and tidy when not in use.
authors_reviews.author: Julie Walter

authors_reviews.title: They are used earbuds!
authors_reviews.text: THEY ARE USED EARBUDS!!! They work great and all but I have bought 4 times of these and once they came damaged and not working so be careful with the packaging if you want to return these. i have no idea why they don’t sell new pair they only have used ones…
authors_reviews.author: Nathalie Archambault

authors_reviews.title: Super cool
authors_reviews.text: Simple and reliable wired earbuds with USB-C plug-and-play convenience. They’re comfortable for everyday use, have built-in controls and a mic, and don’t need charging. Sound quality is decent for the price, but the bass is basic and there’s no noise isolation. Great budget choice if you want easy audio without wireless hassles.
authors_reviews.author: Rupali papade
